prompt: Let's make a pattern! First, add an object and make it RED.
Start your pattern — add something and make it red!
feedback: Red — that's the start of your pattern! Remember: red...
A red object! First piece of the pattern.

prompt: Now add another and make it BLUE. Red… then blue!
Add a blue one next — red, then blue!
feedback: Blue! Red, blue... what do you think comes next?
Red, blue — can you guess the pattern?

prompt: Red again! Add one more and make it red.
Back to red — add another red one!
feedback: Red again! Red, blue, red… do you see it?
Red! The pattern is: red, blue, red, blue!

prompt: One more blue to finish! Add a blue one to complete the pattern.
Last one — blue to finish your pattern!
feedback: Red, blue, red, blue — a repeating pattern! You made it all by yourself!
A perfect pattern — red, blue, red, blue! Well done!
